categories.name: Blades
categories.description: The wooden core of a table tennis racket, determining speed and control characteristics.

items.name: All-round Blade
items.description: Balanced blade suitable for beginners and intermediate players.

items.name: Offensive Blade
items.description: Fast blade designed for aggressive attacking play.

items.name: Defensive Blade
items.description: Slower blade optimized for control and chopping techniques.

categories.name: Rubbers
categories.description: The rubber covering on each side of the blade that directly contacts the ball.

items.name: Inverted (Smooth) Rubber
items.description: The most common rubber type with a smooth surface for maximum spin and speed.

items.name: Short Pips Rubber
items.description: Rubber with short outward-facing pimples for flat hits and blocking.

items.name: Long Pips Rubber
items.description: Rubber with long pimples that reverses incoming spin, used for defensive play.

categories.name: Balls
categories.description: Regulation table tennis balls made of poly material, 40mm in diameter.

items.name: 3-Star Competition Ball
items.description: Highest quality balls approved for official competitions and tournaments.

items.name: Training Ball
items.description: Good quality balls for practice sessions, slightly less consistent than competition grade.

categories.name: Tables
categories.description: Regulation table tennis tables with standard dimensions of 274cm x 152.5cm x 76cm.

items.name: Competition Table
items.description: ITTF-approved tables with 25mm+ thick tops for consistent bounce.

items.name: Recreation Table
items.description: Affordable tables suitable for home and recreational play.

categories.name: Accessories
categories.description: Essential accessories for table tennis players.

items.name: Rubber Cleaner
items.description: Spray or foam cleaners to maintain rubber tackiness and extend lifespan.

items.name: Edge Tape
items.description: Protective tape applied around the racket edge to prevent rubber peeling.

categories.name: Shoes & Apparel
categories.description: Specialized footwear and clothing designed for table tennis movement.

items.name: Table Tennis Shoes
items.description: Lightweight shoes with non-marking soles designed for quick lateral movements.

items.name: Playing Apparel
items.description: Official tournament-approved shirts and shorts made of breathable materials.
